calendar.matters:
PETITION TO TERMINATE ESTATE (NO ASSETS)
Off Calendar Feb-10-2026 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Nov-25-2025 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-25-2025 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Michael Dobrov for executor Lonnie Wollin (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on Order to Show Cause Why Attorney Should Not be Sanctioned for Failure to Appear.

The Court stated it had reviewed counsel's declaration and, in consideration of counsel's acknowledgment and explanation, the Court declined to impose sanctions. The Court discharged the Order to Show Cause and took the matter off calendar.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Oct-21-2025 Continued To Nov-25-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. An Order to Appear/Order to Show Cause shall be issued to attorney Michael Dobrov to appear on November 25, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204, to explain why they should not be sanctioned $250 under CCP Section 128 for failure to appear. The hearing on Status on Close of Estate was continued to the same date.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-17-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated November 09, 1992 is admitted to probate. Lonnie Wollin is appointed as the Executor/Administrator of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $20,000.00. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for October 21, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status on administration is filed two weeks prior to the hearing date, the status hearing will go off calendar. Shirly Yawitz is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Stephen Murphy Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Ng. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-06-2024 Continued To Sep-17-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michael Dobrov appeared by zoom for Lonnie Wollin.

The court raised the issue of the DE-147S form showing that the petitioner's driver's license was issued in New Jersey, but he lives in Utah. Mr. Dobrov stated that his client recently relocated to Utah for work, but he is based in New Jersey, that presumably his client's brother can provide proof of the decedent's handwriting, that the will was executed 30-years ago, and that the decedent wasn't married and had no children. the court referred to Probate Code 8221. Mr. Dobrov stated that he can provide a declaration from the brother. The court informed Mr. Dobrov that he needs to file a second amended petition, that he needs to provide notice and that bond has to be set at $20,000.00. The Amended Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is continued to September 17, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. for filing of a second amended petition and the declaration. The court will waive the publication requirement.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Belen. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-25-2024 Continued To Aug-06-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
